title: Detect A cycle in Undirected Graph using DFS

content.problemStatement: Given an undirected graph with V vertices and E edges, check whether it contains any cycle or not using DFS.
content.inputFormat: The first line contains two integers V and E, where V is the number of vertices and E is the number of edges. The next E lines contain two integers u and v, representing an edge between vertices u and v.
content.outputFormat: The output should be 'Cycle detected' if the graph contains a cycle, and 'No cycle found' otherwise.

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed

solution.approach: Use DFS to traverse the graph and detect cycles
